g.text: The red edge is the silent-loss edge (v1).
A record that never gets its Patch
simply ages out. Both documented v1 limitations reach Expired along this
(the replica holding the in-memory delivery pipeline dies after the
pollers see 202 until the TTL flips them to 404, which is why callers should treat an
unanswered poll past 5 to 10 minutes as failed and resubmit for a fresh requestId.
